backend/main.mo: Backend actor implementing wellness assessment system with user profiles, medical history tracking, section scores (sleep/hydration/exercise/diet), complete wellness reports with recommendations, and role-based access control using MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the removal/bypass of authentication checks on AdminDashboardPage to allow direct access without login, affecting authorization@4.0.0 component with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including routing, assessment flow, UI components, styling with brand colors, and navigation structure with direct /admin access.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for light/dark themes using OKLCH color space, including shadcn/ui design tokens for backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for ABL Pulse holistic wellness assessment application with meta tags and root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component configuring TanStack Router with routes for home, assessment sections, results, admin dashboard (direct /admin access), and wrapping all routes with AssessmentProvider context.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component displaying Root Cause Healing philosophy, four core values cards with icons and hover effects, and integrated FounderProfile component.
frontend/src/components/admin/AccessDeni: Displays a bilingual access denied message with a shield icon and a button to navigate back to the home page for unauthorized admin access attempts.
frontend/src/components/admin/Assessment: Provides filtering UI for assessments with search by name, date range pickers, score range inputs, and a clear filters button showing active filter count.
frontend/src/components/admin/QuickStats: Displays four statistical cards (total assessments, average score, alert users, recent submissions) calculated from assessment data with loading skeleton states.
frontend/src/components/admin/StatCard.t: A reusable card component displaying a statistic with title, value, icon, optional subtitle, and variant-based color styling (default/success/warning/danger).
frontend/src/components/admin/TablePagin: Provides pagination controls with page navigation buttons, page size selector, and display of current range and total items for data tables.
frontend/src/components/admin/UserAssess: Admin data table component that displays user assessment data with filtering (search, date range, score range), sorting, pagination, and CSV export functionality.
frontend/src/components/AnalysisCard.tsx: Reusable card component for displaying problems (red background) or suggestions (green background) with bilingual titles and conditional rendering of items or empty state.
frontend/src/components/AssessmentPlaceh: Empty placeholder component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/AssessmentProgre: Progress bar component showing current section (1-4), percentage completion (25% increments), and animated gradient progress indicator.
frontend/src/components/BasicInfoForm.ts: Form component for collecting user's basic information (name, age, gender, profession, physical measurements, contact details, and medical history) before starting the health assessment. Validates inputs, stores data locally, and navigates to the first assessment section on submission.
frontend/src/components/CircularScoreGau: Circular progress gauge component that displays a health score with color-coded gradients (red for alert, amber for needs work, green for optimal) using SVG circles and animated stroke offsets.
frontend/src/components/ContactFooter.ts: Footer component displaying brand information, quick navigation links, social media icons, WhatsApp consultation button, and admin access link with copyright information.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React error boundary class component that catches JavaScript errors in child components and displays a bilingual (English/Hindi) error UI with retry and reload options.
frontend/src/components/FounderProfile.t: Profile card component showcasing Dr. Suman Lal, the founder with 40+ years of experience, including a circular profile image and mission statement about making Ayurvedic health accessible.
frontend/src/components/GlobalAssessment: Reusable component rendering bilingual (English/Hindi) frequency options (Never, Rarely, Sometimes, Often, Daily) as selectable buttons for assessment questions with values 0-4.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Landing page hero section with animated wave and pulse backgrounds, featuring main headline, tagline, and two CTAs for starting the health assessment or booking a WhatsApp consultation.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelectio: Empty component file for language selection functionality (no implementation present).
frontend/src/components/LanguageToggleBu: Empty component file for language toggle button functionality (no implementation present).
frontend/src/components/LoadingScreen.ts: Full-screen loading component displaying the ABL Pulse logo with pulse animation, a progress bar with gradient animation, and bilingual loading text.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Main navigation component with desktop header and mobile logo, featuring smooth scroll navigation, assessment routing logic, and a language toggle button (EN/HI) that appears during assessment sections.
frontend/src/components/QuestionCard.tsx: Empty component file for question card functionality (no implementation present).
frontend/src/components/QuestionCard40.t: Empty component file for question card functionality (no implementation present).
frontend/src/components/ResultsPage.tsx: Empty component file for results page functionality (no implementation present).
frontend/src/components/ResumeProgressMo: Empty component file for resume progress modal functionality (no implementation present).
frontend/src/components/SectionContainer: Empty component file for section container functionality (no implementation present).
frontend/src/components/SectionScoreCard: Displays a bilingual (English/Hindi) card showing a health section's score out of 40, status category (alert/needsWork/optimal), progress bar, and color-coded status indicators.
frontend/src/components/ServicesGrid.tsx: Renders a grid of four service cards (Health Score Card, Webinars, 1-on-1 Support, Structured Programs) with icons, titles, and descriptions in a responsive layout.
frontend/src/components/TipCard.tsx: An expandable accordion card component displaying bilingual health tips with icon, title, description, and collapsible detailed explanation section.
frontend/src/config/constants.ts: Application-wide constants including WhatsApp consultation number, message template, app metadata, and score thresholds for section and total scores.
React context providing assessment state management including responses for 40 questions, current section, language selection, and section completion/access logic with localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/data/questions/en.ts: English language questions for a 12-question assessment covering sleep, hydration, diet, exercise, stress, and mental well-being across 4 sections.
frontend/src/data/questions/hi.ts: Hindi language translations of the 12-question assessment covering sleep, hydration, diet, exercise, stress, and mental well-being across 4 sections.
frontend/src/data/sections/section1.ts: Section 1 questions (IDs 1-10) in English and Hindi covering sleep routine, hydration, sunlight exposure, eating habits, and screen time before bed.
frontend/src/data/sections/section2.ts: Section 2 questions (IDs 11-20) in English and Hindi covering dietary habits including beverages, seeds, fasting window, digestion issues, ghee, sugar, and meal timing.
frontend/src/data/sections/section3.ts: Section 3 questions (IDs 21-30) in English and Hindi covering physical activity including walking, stretching, breathing exercises, movement breaks, and strength training.
frontend/src/data/sections/section4.ts: Section 4 questions (IDs 31-40) in English and Hindi covering mental and emotional well-being including gratitude, positivity, family time, stress management, and professional guidance.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using Internet Identity, with query caching and automatic invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBasicInfoStorage.t: React hook providing localStorage utilities for saving, retrieving, clearing, and validating basic user information form data including name, age, gender, profession, physical measurements, and WhatsApp number.
frontend/src/hooks/useDebounce.ts: Custom React hook that debounces a value by a specified delay using setTimeout and useEffect.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/usePagination.ts: Generic pagination hook that manages page state, calculates paginated data slices, and provides navigation functions (next, previous, goToPage).
frontend/src/hooks/usePDFDownload.ts: Custom hook that manages PDF generation state and downloads wellness reports using the pdfGenerator utility with toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and mutating wellness reports, checking admin status, and transforming backend data for the admin dashboard.
frontend/src/hooks/useTableSort.ts: Custom hook for managing table sorting state with column selection, direction toggling, and a generic comparator function.
frontend/src/index.css: Global styles with Tailwind configuration, OKLCH color system for brand colors, custom animations (pulse-glow, electric-wave-flow), and font imports for Playfair Display and Montserrat.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page displaying wellness assessment statistics, user data table, and navigation with error handling.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Empty file placeholder for admin login page implementation.
frontend/src/pages/AssessmentPage.tsx: Assessment page that displays the BasicInfoForm component with logo and back navigation to home.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page composing Navigation, HeroSection, ServicesGrid, AboutSection, and ContactFooter components.
frontend/src/pages/LogicCorrectionDocsPa: Documentation page that displays a template format for submitting logic corrections and feature updates, with bilingual (English/Hindi) instructions and structured sections for clear communication with the development team.
frontend/src/pages/RecommendedServicesPa: Displays recommended wellness services (Health Webinars, 1-on-1 Coaching, Functional Readiness Program) based on user assessment scores, showing user info card with total score and status.
frontend/src/pages/ResultsPage.tsx: Shows comprehensive assessment results with circular score gauge, section breakdowns, analysis cards, and action buttons for PDF download and WhatsApp consultation booking.
frontend/src/pages/Section1.tsx: Assessment page for Section 1 (Sleep & Hydration) with bilingual questions, progress bar, navigation controls, and validation to ensure completion before proceeding.
frontend/src/pages/Section2.tsx: Assessment page for Section 2 (Gut Cleanse & Metabolic) with access guards requiring Section 1 completion, bilingual questions, and navigation between sections.
frontend/src/pages/Section3.tsx: Assessment page for Section 3 (Movement & Circulation Flow) with sequential access control requiring previous sections completion, bilingual interface, and progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/Section4.tsx: Renders the fourth section of the wellness assessment with navigation guards, progress tracking, and a loading overlay that appears when submitting all responses before navigating to results.
frontend/src/pages/TestModePage.tsx: Displays three test profiles (healthy, moderate, serious) with scores and medical history fetched from the backend actor, showing results in tabs with circular gauges and section cards.
frontend/src/pages/WellnessProfilePage.t: Displays a user's wellness profile with basic info, total ABL score, and section-by-section scores with color-coded status indicators based on calculated thresholds.
frontend/src/types/admin.ts: Defines TypeScript types for admin dashboard data structures including assessment rows, filter state, sorting, and pagination.
frontend/src/types/assessment.ts: Defines core assessment types including language selection, basic info form data with medical history, and question/section structures.
Provides utility functions to calculate admin dashboard statistics including total assessments, average scores, alert users, and recent submissions.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Handles CSV export functionality for assessment data including field escaping, formatting, CSV generation, and browser download triggering.
frontend/src/utils/patternAnalysis.ts: Implements rule-based pattern analysis that identifies low-scoring question groups and maps them to specific health problems with Ayurvedic habit suggestions in English and Hindi.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Generates a formatted text-based wellness report as a downloadable file containing user info, scores, section breakdown, problems, and habit suggestions.
frontend/src/utils/resultsSharingUtils.t: Empty utility file intended for results sharing functionality.
frontend/src/utils/scoringUtils.ts: Provides scoring calculation utilities for a 40-question assessment divided into 4 sections (10 questions each, max 40 points per section, 160 total), with functions to categorize scores into alert/needsWork/optimal ranges and return appropriate styling classes.
frontend/src/utils/testDataProcessor.ts: Converts backend SectionScores into frontend-displayable format by generating realistic question-level responses from section totals, running pattern analysis, and adding medical-history-specific recommendations.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and functions to clear sensitive parameters from the URL after extraction.
frontend/src/utils/whatsappIntegration.t: Opens a WhatsApp consultation link with a pre-filled message containing the user's name and ABL score, directing to a default consultation number.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color schemes using OKLCH color space, brand colors, typography with Playfair Display and Montserrat fonts, custom animations, and plugins for typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state file tracking the ABL Pulse admin dashboard feature implementation, documenting a known issue where the admin button shows 'Access Denied' instead of linking directly to the dashboard, with pending fix requests to bypass authentication.
